notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Andrew Morris on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill flies out to left fielder Trevor Larnach.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brooks Lee reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Chase Meidroth. Byron Buxton to 2nd. Byron Buxton advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Chase Meidroth.
